prompt:
A clean premium wellness-brand PRODUCT SHOT on a PURE WHITE background, 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Hero product photography style with three ingredient callouts. Generous breathing room.

HERO SUBJECT — centered: photorealistic rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, gold lid). A small ceramic dish next to the jar with 4-5 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES.

FLOATING INGREDIENT CALLOUTS — three clean ingredient cards arranged around the jar (one on the upper-left, one on the right, one on the lower-left). Each card has:
  • A small CLEAN BLACK-INK BOTANICAL LINE-ART illustration of the ingredient (sea moss frond / burdock root / dandelion).
  • A small chevron-shaped teal callout with a bold ALL-CAPS ingredient name and dosage:
     – SEA MOSS · 250mg
     – BURDOCK ROOT · 150mg
     – DANDELION · 100mg
  • One tiny sub-line of light-gray body text under each callout describing the benefit in 4-5 words:
     – SEA MOSS: '92 essential minerals'
     – BURDOCK ROOT: 'Natural detox support'
     – DANDELION: 'Liver + vitamin boost'
  Thin gold connector lines lead from each callout toward the jar.

TOP — a single short ALL-CAPS headline in deep ink-black: 'THREE BOTANICALS, ONE GUMMY.' (bold condensed display sans-serif). Thin gold rule beneath.

BOTTOM — tiny tagline in tracked light-gray all-caps: 'TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE'.

DESIGN SYSTEM:
  • Background: pure clean white with very subtle warm-gray paper texture.
  • Accent colors: muted TEAL/CYAN, warm GOLD/YELLOW, deep INK-BLACK type, warm-gray sub-text.
  • Typography: bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif for headlines/labels, clean modern sans-serif for body. NO script fonts.
  • Botanical illustrations: clean hand-drawn black ink line-art, NO color.
  • Mood: editorial wellness-brand hero shot — Athletic Greens / Hims / Apple product-page aesthetic.

ABSOLUTE RULES:
  • All text MUST be cleanly spelled, no garbled letters, no AI-text artifacts.
  • 1:1 square, 4K, pure white background, NO border, NO frame.
  • Reference the provided image for brand color/type and jar appearance.
